Home / Services / Sewer Line Services

Sewer Line Services

Comprehensive sewer line inspection, repair, and replacement solutions.

South Beach Plumbing and HVAC Inc. offers comprehensive sewer line services to address the unique challenges faced by Miami homeowners. From older homes in Little Havana to newer developments, sewer line issues can arise due to tree root intrusion, corrosion, or ground shifting. We provide a range of sewer line services, including video inspection, trenchless repair, and traditional replacement. Video inspection allows us to accurately diagnose the problem and determine the most effective solution. Trenchless repair methods minimize disruption to your property, while traditional replacement is necessary for severely damaged sewer lines. We understand the importance of a properly functioning sewer line and offer 24/7 emergency service to address urgent issues. Our experienced technicians will ensure your sewer line is operating efficiently and reliably.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Video Inspection - We use a camera to inspect the sewer line and identify any problems.
  2. 02 Step 2: Diagnosis - We diagnose the cause of the sewer line issue and recommend the best solution.
  3. 03 Step 3: Repair or Replacement - We repair or replace the sewer line using appropriate methods and materials.
  4. 04 Step 4: Testing and Verification - We test the repaired or replaced sewer line to ensure it's functioning properly.

Benefits

  • Prevent sewer backups
  • Eliminate foul odors
  • Protect your property
  • Ensure proper waste disposal

Frequently Asked Questions

What are the signs of a sewer line problem?

Signs of a sewer line problem include sewage backups, slow drains, foul odors, and gurgling sounds in your plumbing.

What is trenchless sewer repair?

Trenchless sewer repair is a method of repairing or replacing sewer lines without digging a trench. It involves using specialized equipment to insert a new pipe inside the old one.

How much does sewer line repair or replacement cost?

The cost of sewer line repair or replacement varies depending on the extent of the damage and the method used. We offer free estimates to assess your specific needs.

Get a Free Estimate
